//: Compile-only check of the public type surface AND every hand-authored `// @ts-check` source file (client src + mock logic/fixtures). Not a build — `noEmit`. Run by `npm run test:types`. allowJs lets tsc read the `// @ts-check` JS files so drift from the overlayed schema / JSDoc is a compile error. The Counterfact route handlers under mock/counterfact/routes are intentionally excluded — they run against Counterfact's untyped `$` context.
